settings.html:
Spring 2027

Financial Services Attorneys

Legal League Servicer Summit

The National Press Club  |  Washington, D.C.

The annual gathering of Legal League member firms, mortgage servicers, and financial services attorneys. A full day of education, direct dialogue between the legal community and mortgage servicers, and the professional relationships that define how the industry navigates the housing lifecycle. Hosted during Government Forum Week.

Learn More Join Legal League
Apr 15 2026

Mortgage Finance

Five Star Government Forum

Washington, D.C.

A landmark annual event where leaders in mortgage servicing and the federal government engage in open dialogue on the industry's most pressing policy issues. With representation from the CFPB, HUD, FHFA, Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, Ginnie Mae, and others. NMSA and MSEA hold their spring in-person meetings during Government Forum week.

Learn More Register Now
May 20-21 2026

Real Estate Professionals

Velocity Conference

The Westin  |  New Orleans, Louisiana

The annual gathering of the FSI real estate professional community. Two days of education, structured introductions, and the industry relationships that build real careers in REO, distressed property, and single-family residential investment. Features FORCE Connect, the Asset Manager Panel, the FSI Offers platform launch, and the Charter Member offer for the first 100 new Five Star Alliance members.

Learn More Register Now
Sep 1-3 2026

All Professions

Five Star Conference and Expo

The Omni Hotel  |  Dallas, Texas

Every professional community FSI serves comes together once a year at Five Star Conference. Mortgage finance executives, financial services attorneys, real estate professionals, and property services leaders. Three days of leadership, education, community governance, and the industry conversations that define direction for the year ahead. FORCE members receive complimentary registration. Alliance members receive discounted registration.

Learn More Register Now

_authoring_notes: Phase 2 Events hub Section 2: 4 event cards (LLSS, Government Forum, Velocity, Five Star Conference).
HTML widget inside a full-width container. No bg color set on container (white by page default).
Card layout via fsi-event-card class + fsi-event-date / fsi-event-body -- styled by fsi-event-styles.php mu-plugin.
LLSS card links to /events/legal-league-servicer-summit/ (canonical singular slug for Phase 1.11). Will 404 on prod until Phase 1.11 ships -- expected.
Velocity card links to /events/velocity/ -- live on prod 5110 since Wave 1 Step 1.
Government Forum and FSC cards link to external URLs.
Join Legal League button links to /memberships/financial-services-attorneys/ -- Phase 4a page, not yet built.
Source extracted from staging page 5089 _elementor_data 2026-04-30 after in-place swap (done 2026-04-27 PM).
